strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise across multiple production environments, directly matching the core required stack
Hands-on LLM/AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) covering the highest-value nice-to-have
Demonstrated software craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and public teaching — signals strong code quality instincts
concerns: Severe seniority mismatch: 15+ years of experience including Staff and Senior titles makes this a Junior/Mid-level role unlikely to retain or engage the candidate
Location conflict: candidate is based in Lagos, Nigeria, while the role requires high on-site presence — likely in a European office
Relational database depth is thin on the resume (MongoDB and MySQL featured; PostgreSQL absent), and React/Nest.js appear only incidentally despite being core requirements
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is technically well-aligned with the stack — strong TypeScript, Node.js, and emerging AI tooling — but is a fundamentally poor fit for this specific opening: he is a Staff-level engineer with over 15 years of experience being evaluated for an entry-level role, and he is based in Lagos, which conflicts with the high on-site presence requirement. Even if the technical skills were a perfect match, the seniority gap creates near-certain retention and motivation risk, and the geographic constraint would require relocation agreement that is not indicated.
